content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.cli_bridge.base
FILE: cosmos/integration/cli_bridge/base.py (360 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: CLI Bridge Base - Abstract interface for CLI-based AI providers.

"Any CLI that speaks, the swarm can hear." - The Collective

Provides the CLIBridge ABC that wraps AI CLI tools (Claude Code, Gemini CLI, etc.)
into async subprocess-based providers with:
- Semaphore-based concurrency limiting
- Struc

CLASSES:
- CLICapability(Enum): Capabilities that a CLI tool may provide.
- CLIHealth: Health status for a CLI bridge.
- CLIResponse: Response from a CLI query.
- CLIBridge(ABC): Abstract base for CLI-based AI providers.

Handles subprocess lifecycle, concurr
  Methods: def get_capabilities(self) -> Set[CLICapability]
  Methods: def build_command(self, prompt: str, system_prompt: Optional[str]=None, model: Optional[str]=None, m
  Methods: def parse_output(self, raw: str) -> CLIResponse
  Methods: def parse_stream_line(self, line: str) -> Optional[str]
  Methods: def detect_rate_limit(self, raw: str, returncode: int) -> bool
  Methods: async def query(self, prompt: str, system_prompt: Optional[str]=None, model: Optional[str]=None, max
  Methods: async def query_streaming(self, prompt: str, system_prompt: Optional[str]=None, model: Optional[str]
  Methods: async def check_health(self) -> CLIHealth
